scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend "cd Back && venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 3000" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend "cd Back && venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 3000" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
